name: Evelyne leather handbag
description:
Brand New.

The Evelyne 16 TPM is the most compact expression of Hermès’ equestrian-inspired design, blending functionality with a relaxed, modern aesthetic. Crafted from Clemence leather, a supple yet durable calfskin with a pronounced grain, the bag offers a soft structure with a matte finish. The iconic perforated “H” motif defines the front, originally designed for ventilation but now a signature visual element. Finished with palladium-tone hardware, the minimalist silhouette features a simple snap tab closure and an unlined interior that highlights the natural suede underside of the leather. The adjustable canvas strap allows for comfortable crossbody or shoulder wear, making it an effortless everyday piece.

Please check images for details.
Full set: Box, dustbag, and strap included.
Size (approx.):

Length: 16 cm / 6.69 in
Height: 18 cm / 7.09 in
Depth: 5 cm / 1.97 in
Features:
